demo.title: Browser demo mode
demo.body: Claude Code not connected. Run {cmd} in the maestrus directory to open the Electron app with real IPC.

nav.deleteProject: Delete this project? (the code on Drive is not removed)
nav.deleteConfirmCloud: Delete this project? All history and files on Maestrus Cloud will be permanently removed. (local source files are kept)
nav.deleteConfirmLocal: Delete this project? All history will be permanently removed. (local source files are kept)

empty.subtitle: orchestrator for Claude Code
empty.hint: Create a project to get started.

chat.placeholder: How can I help?  (type / for commands, drag files)
chat.queuePlaceholder: AI is responding — your message will queue automatically
chat.lockedOn: Turn running on {host} — input disabled until it finishes
chat.dropFiles: Drop file(s) here — they go as {at} to claude

settings.title: Settings
settings.syncDesc: maestrus creates {folder} and stores code + sessions there. To sync across PCs, choose a folder inside Google Drive Desktop.
settings.syncResult: Sync: {imported} new, {updated} updated, {total} total on Drive.
settings.languageDesc: Choose the interface language. The default is English.
settings.voiceSttDesc: Which engine transcribes your speech in Voice Mode. Deepgram is more accurate and faster (cloud); the browser one is free and runs locally.
settings.voiceSttDeepgramDesc: Cloud transcription, high accuracy and low latency.
settings.voiceSttBrowserDesc: Browser Web Speech — free and local.
settings.voiceSttUnavailable: Deepgram isn't available on this account — using the browser.
settings.graphicsDesc: If text looks blurry or hard to read (some Windows 10 PCs with older graphics drivers), turn on compatibility mode. It disables hardware acceleration to render crisp text.
settings.aboutText: Maestrus — the orchestrator for Claude Code, across all your projects. Desktop, web and mobile.
settings.cloudDesc: Your projects, history and memory sync through the Maestrus cloud across all your devices. Sign in under Maestrus Cloud (sidebar).
settings.cloudLoginFirst: Sign in to Maestrus Cloud first.
settings.syncIntervalDesc: How often Maestrus checks for session changes and syncs across devices (merge — no data loss).
settings.browserDesc: Choose which browser the AI drives. Maestrus native is the built-in, isolated browser (sessions stay logged in). Or pick a real browser detected on your machine to use your own logins.
settings.importDesc: Bring an existing Claude Code session into Maestrus as a project, with its full history — synced to the cloud so you continue on any device. Requires an active Maestrus Cloud sign-in.
settings.importLoginFirst: Sign in to Maestrus Cloud first to import.
settings.noSessions: No Claude Code sessions found on this machine.
settings.searchSessions: Search by name, folder or branch…

cat.github: Repositories, issues, PRs and code search.

mcp.title: MCP Servers
mcp.subtitle: MCP (Model Context Protocol) servers registered in the {claude} CLI. They're shared between maestrus and Claude Code — adding here is the same as running {cmd} in the terminal.
mcp.emptyHint: Click "Add" to register the first one.
mcp.fieldCommandHint: Use the full command with args. For HTTP/SSE, pass the URL.
mcp.libDesc: Connect popular services so the agent can use them in every session — just fill in the auth. Tokens are encrypted locally and (on Pro) synced to your Maestrus Cloud.
mcp.unavailable: MCP is not available on this device.
mcp.noCrypto: OS encryption is unavailable — tokens cannot be stored securely here.
mcp.customDesc: Plug any MCP server by command. Env vars go to the encrypted vault.
mcp.unifiedSub: Connect MCP servers so the agent can use them in every session. Search the official MCP Registry, pick popular ones, or add your own. Tokens are encrypted locally and (on Pro) synced.
mcp.noResults: No server found. Try another term.
mcp.searchErr: Could not reach the MCP registry.

newProject.title: New project
newProject.name: Project name
newProject.repoHint: Will be cloned into the maestrus folder on Google Drive.
newProject.localHint: Claude operates directly in this folder. Only the session goes to Drive.
newProject.remoteHint: Mount the production path via SSHFS-Win/macFUSE first, then select it here.
newProject.emptyHint: Creates a project with an empty folder. Useful to start from scratch.

model.title: Model
model.cloudCost: Cloud AI cost per model — Opus $$$ · Sonnet $$ · Haiku $. Most of the cost is the cached context on the first message of each chat.
model.descFable5: Claude Fable 5 — Anthropic's most capable model (Mythos-class). Top-tier coding, reasoning, vision and long tasks.
model.descFable5_1m: Claude Fable 5 with a 1M-token window — Anthropic's most capable for huge context.

ssh.hint: Pick the project folder on the server. Maestrus mirrors it locally so Claude can work, and pushes changes back via SFTP. Credentials are stored encrypted on this machine only.
ssh.errCreds: Fill in host, user and password/key

update.patchReady: Ready — restart to apply (no permissions lost)

cloud.title: Maestrus Cloud
cloud.startingInstance: Starting the cloud instance… this can take a few seconds.
cloud.starting: The cloud instance is still starting — send your message again in a moment.
cloud.loginTagline: Sign in to your Maestrus Cloud account
cloud.errConn: Could not connect. Check your internet.
cloud.overageHint: Above your included quota you pay per GB-month.
cloud.aiOverageHint: used after the monthly included runs out
cloud.syncProject: Sync this project to the cloud
cloud.cloudSub: Run a project 100% in the cloud — even with your PC off.
cloud.cloudExplain: Activate a project to spin up a cloud runtime (sandbox). The agent installs and runs it, and you get a live preview URL. Continue from any device.
cloud.cloudEmpty: No cloud project yet. Activate one above.
cloud.activating: Spinning up the sandbox and installing… this can take ~2 min.
cloud.confirmStop: Stop the cloud session "{name}"? The sandbox is killed.
cloud.activateTitle: Activate this project on the cloud
cloud.activateConfirm: Activate "{name}" on the cloud? It uploads the code/session/memory, installs and runs it in a cloud sandbox — access it with your PC off. Takes ~2 min.
cloud.activatedOk: "{name}" is now on the cloud! Open it in Remote Control / the mobile app.
cloud.containerDesc: A full Maestrus running 24/7 in the cloud — access from any device, no need to keep your computer on.
cloud.containerErrTrial: Your trial has expired — subscribe to a plan to activate your instance.
cloud.containerErrPro: Available on Cloud plans — upgrade in the panel.
cloud.containerErrGeneric: We could not create your instance right now. Try again in a moment.

promo.text: Maestrus Cloud — sync your projects + managed AI across all your devices.

engine.needClaude: Claude CLI selected, but you're not signed in to Claude. Sign in, or switch to Maestrus Cloud AI.
engine.needCloud: Add your Anthropic API key in Settings → Claude API to use this engine.
engine.cloudLocked: This is a cloud project — it runs in the sandbox on Maestrus AI, so the local Claude CLI can't drive it. To use your local CLI, bring the project to local first.

cli.title: Connect Claude CLI
cli.opening: Opening your browser to connect your Claude account…
cli.waiting: Waiting for you to approve in the browser…
cli.openLink: Browser didn't open? Open the link
cli.pasteHint: Didn't connect on its own? Paste the code (or the localhost link) the browser showed:

remote.title: Remote Access
remote.subtitle: Control your projects from any device
remote.explain: Turn this machine into a host: from another Maestrus (desktop or phone) you connect over the cloud and drive the Claude CLI that runs HERE — no API key or install needed on the other device. It uses this machine's Claude plan, and all projects, history and context come from here.
remote.needCloud: Sign in to Maestrus Cloud first (sidebar) to enable remote access.
remote.codeHint: Valid for 5 minutes. On the other device, open Remote Access → Connect and enter this code (or scan the QR).
remote.how1: Click "Be a Host" on this machine (your main PC).
remote.how2: On the other device, open Remote Access → Connect and enter the code / scan the QR.
remote.how3: Your projects appear there with a server badge — every prompt runs on this machine's Claude.
remote.security: Only devices on your account can pair. The code is one-time and expires. Remote sessions never bypass your permission settings.
remote.errNotConfigured: Remote relay isn't configured on the server yet.
remote.errCode: Invalid or expired code. Ask the host to generate a new one.
remote.connectSub: Use another machine's Claude from here
remote.connectExplain: Enter the code shown on the host machine (Remote Access → Be a Host). Its projects will appear in your sidebar with a server badge.
remote.connectedHint: The host's projects are now in your sidebar (server badge). Open one and every prompt runs on that machine's Claude.
remote.screenSub: Your cloud projects and your connected machines, in one place.
remote.proRequired: You used your free remote sessions this month. Upgrade to Pro ($12/mo) for unlimited multi-device. Opened the plans page.
remote.devRemoveConfirm: Remove this device from the list? It reappears if it reconnects.
remote.hostOffHint: Off — this machine isn't sharing its projects.
remote.discoverSub: Auto-syncs machines on the same account
remote.discoverExplain: When on, Maestrus finds and syncs your other machines that have 'Be a Host' enabled — no pairing code. When off, nothing is searched.

mobile.codeHint: On your PC's Maestrus: Remote Access → Be a Host → generate the code.
mobile.queuePlaceholder: AI is responding — message will queue
mobile.noProjects: No remote projects. Make sure the host is online.
mobile.installDesc: Add to your Home Screen for the full app experience
mobile.installIOS: Tap Share, then “Add to Home Screen”
mobile.scanHint: Point at the QR shown on your computer
mobile.cloudRuntime: Running in the cloud · tap to open

auth.body: Sign in to your Anthropic (Claude) account to use Maestrus. Until you do, prompts are disabled.
auth.failed: Could not sign in. Try again, or run `claude auth login` in a terminal.
auth.hint: A browser window will open for you to authorize. After approving, come back and re-check.

permission.title: Permissions
permission.acceptEditsDesc: Accepts edits without asking — asks for the rest

starter.title: Voice Launcher
starter.subtitle: Say your magic phrase and the Maestrus runs a sequence you build with AI — then opens voice mode.
starter.empty: No steps yet. Ask the builder on the right to set up your launcher.

loop.label: Loop
loop.enableTooltip: Enable Loop Mode — Claude will decompose the goal into tasks and queue them in Kanban (async, non-blocking)
loop.bannerText: Loop Mode active — send a goal and Claude will create a plan and queue tasks in Kanban

kanban.title: Kanban
kanban.descPlaceholder: Optional details — included in the prompt sent to the agent.
kanban.loopTooltip: Repeat until the goal is met or the iteration cap is reached

skills.title: Claude Skills
skills.desc: Reusable skills available to the agent in every session and project. Stored in ~/.claude/skills and (on Pro) synced to your Maestrus Cloud.
skills.unavailable: Skills are not available on this device.
skills.empty: No skills yet. Create one so the agent always knows how to do it.
skills.confirmDelete: Delete this skill? This removes its folder from ~/.claude/skills.
skills.descPlaceholder: Describe when the agent should use this skill…
skills.bodyPlaceholder: Markdown instructions the agent follows when the skill triggers…

mode.title: How will you use Maestrus on this PC?
mode.sub: You can change this anytime in Settings.
mode.serverDesc: Everything runs on this machine. It can also host other devices that connect to it.
mode.clientDesc: Mirror another Maestrus (the server) over a pairing code. The agent runs on the server — computer control and voice act there.
mode.changeHint: You can switch modes later in Settings.
mode.settingsDesc: Server (everything local, can host) or Client (mirror a server over the relay).
mode.clientHint: In Client mode, connect to a server in the Remote screen with a pairing code.
mode.hostAlwaysTitle: Be a host on every launch
mode.hostAlwaysDesc: On launch, this machine is instantly available to your other devices (web, phone, another PC) on the same email — they find its projects automatically, no pairing code.
mode.clientConnect: Client mode — connect to a server

byok.title: OpenAI Voice (BYOK)
byok.desc: Use your own OpenAI key to power the realtime voice assistant. The key is encrypted with your license and stored on your Maestrus account — works across desktop, PWA and web.
byok.label: OpenAI API key
byok.invalidFormat: Invalid format — OpenAI keys start with sk-…
byok.confirmDelete: Delete your OpenAI key from all your devices?
byok.footnote: Enables realtime voice (gpt-4o-realtime) with full access to Maestrus tools, MCPs, project dispatch and computer use.
byok.voiceLocked: Realtime voice needs an OpenAI key
byok.voiceLockedDesc: Set your key in Settings to enable the assistant.

rate.limited: You've reached the limit of 10 messages per minute. Please wait a moment.

share.title: Share Workspace
share.noShares: No shared workspaces yet. Ask a colleague to invite you.

download.title: Download Maestrus
download.sub: The desktop app combines your local, remote and cloud projects — all in the same account.
download.foot: Also available: use it in the browser or install as an app (PWA) on mobile.

claudeAcc.title: Claude accounts
claudeAcc.desc: Register more than one Claude subscription and switch when one hits its limit — the conversation continues exactly where it left off.
claudeAcc.notConnected: Connect to a host to manage accounts.
claudeAcc.confirmRemove: Remove this account from Maestrus? (conversation history is shared and will NOT be deleted)
claudeAcc.footnote: The switch applies from the next message, across all projects on this host. History is shared between accounts.

claudeApi.title: Claude API
claudeApi.desc: Use your own Anthropic API key as an alternative engine (Claude CLI × Claude API switch at the top of the chat). The key is encrypted with your license and works on all your devices — including your Maestrus in the cloud.
claudeApi.label: Anthropic API key
claudeApi.invalidFormat: Invalid format — the key starts with sk-ant-…
claudeApi.confirmDelete: Remove your Anthropic key from all your devices?

powers.sub: Everything Claude can use, in one place — skills, subagents, commands, MCP connectors, global rules and your accounts. Applies to every project.
powers.skillsDesc: Skills teach the AI to work YOUR way. They live in your account — desktop, web and your Maestrus in the cloud.
powers.agentsDesc: Subagents are specialists Claude summons in parallel — a reviewer, a documenter, a bug hunter. Each with its own prompt.
powers.commandsDesc: Commands become /shortcuts in any project chat — the prompt you use all the time, one "/" away.
powers.rulesDesc: Global rules (CLAUDE.md) — apply to ALL projects on this host. Conventions, tone, never-dos. Each project still has its own CLAUDE.md (editable in the project chat).
powers.rulesPh:
# My global rules

- Always answer in English
- Conventional commits…
powers.name: Name
powers.descPh: One line — when the AI should use this
powers.skillBodyPh: Skill instructions in Markdown — what the AI should know/do when this skill is used…
powers.agentBodyPh: Subagent system prompt — specialty, tone, rules…
powers.commandBodyPh: The prompt that runs when you type /command-name in the chat…
powers.emptySkills: No skills yet. Skills teach the AI to do something YOUR way — across all your devices.
powers.emptyAgents: No subagents yet. Agents are specialists Claude summons for specific tasks.
powers.emptyCommands: No commands yet. Commands become /shortcuts in the chat — e.g. /review, /deploy.
powers.notConnected: Connect to a host to manage.
powers.mcpWebDesc: MCP connectors are installed on the host (your machine or your Maestrus in the cloud) via the desktop app. Claude account connectors (Gmail, Drive…) are managed on the Claude website.
powers.mcpConnectedTitle: Connected in your Claude right now
powers.mcpConnectedDesc: Straight from `claude mcp list` — the source of truth. Includes servers added outside Maestrus.
powers.mcpConnectedEmpty: No MCP connected in this host's Claude yet.

selfhost.title: My Maestrus (self-host)
selfhost.desc: This is your Maestrus server. Enter the access key set in your docker-compose (SELFHOST_SECRET).
selfhost.errConn: Could not connect to the server.
selfhost.foot: Maestrus self-host — your infra, your Claude account, your data.

selfhostDesk.title: Connect to my server
selfhostDesk.sub: Your own self-hosted Maestrus (docker) — address + access key.
selfhostDesk.explain: No account, no cloud — talks straight to your server. The AI is your own Claude account.
selfhostDesk.notServer: That address is not a Maestrus server.
